# F054 Descriptor Margin-Gated Rerun

## Decision
`F054_DESCRIPTOR_MARGIN_RERUN_ZERO_FALLBACK`

## Purpose
F053 established that F051 lacked enough train-only near-tie lower-tail diagnostics to certify a nonzero residual. F054 reruns the same small real JEPA path on fresh seeds and logs those diagnostics before held-out scoring.

## Selection Rule
`Train-only near-tie lower-tail gate on scale grid {0, 0.005, 0.01, 0.0125, 0.025, 0.05}; held-out rows scoring-only after scale selection.`

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.000000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `0.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `True`
- active gates pass: `True`
- selected transition: `0.319013`
- floor transition: `0.319013`
- selected delta cosine: `0.887988`
- floor delta cosine: `0.887988`
- selected recall@1: `0.777778`
- floor recall@1: `0.777778`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- train selected near-tie erosions mean: `0.000000`
- train selected near-tie flips mean: `0.000000`
- train selected near-tie count mean: `32.666667`
- train selected q10 margin change mean: `0.000000`
- heldout broken rows: `0`
